tasks.prompt: Fix JsonAdapterFactory.create so it returns a non-null adapter for unknown types instead of crashing with NullPointerException. Preserve the existing adapter delegation flow for primitives.

context.raw: Moshi's JsonAdapterFactory.create delegates to adapters for each type. The factory at moshi/src/main/java/com/squareup/moshi/JsonAdapterFactory.kt currently throws NPE when the type is not in the registry. The fix should return a null/empty adapter gracefully. Tests at moshi/src/test/java/com/squareup/moshi/JsonAdapterFactoryTest.kt verify type resolution.
context.sdl: Symbol JsonAdapterFactory.create: returns adapter or null. Check type registry lookup and fallback path.

tasks.prompt: Resolve NullPointerException in StandardJsonAdapters when serializing a Kotlin data class with a nullable List field that holds a null element. The adapter should filter nulls or use JsonAdapter.nonNullValue() appropriately.

context.raw: StandardJsonAdapters handles built-in type adapters. When a data class has a nullable List<String> containing null elements, the ListJsonAdapter throws NPE during toJson. The fix allows nullable elements or uses filterNotNull. Tests at StandardJsonAdaptersTest verify null handling.
context.sdl: Hot path: StandardJsonAdapters.listAdapter -> ListJsonAdapter.toJson encounters null element. Add null-safe element handling.
